highlights.text: Generally, the bull case for tomorrow would be that this zone holds.
This trade was triggered by the same thing that triggers almost every significant rally though: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
Back on Monday at 4pm (when we were 5744), I wrote: “There is an active failed breakdown present where we lost the Thursday lows at 5733, flushed it, and recovered.
Then we can head to all time highs.” This move started how every major move does: ES flushed last Thursdays lows on Monday, trapped shorts, institutions loaded up, and we rallied.

post_title: FOMC Tomorrow. Can SPX Bulls Keep The Run Going, Or Will We Rug Pull? Nov 7 Plan
